WITH annual_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        ym.CustomerID,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c 
        ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM annual_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_sme_lam,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_lam_kam,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_kam_sme
FROM min_consumption_per_segment;

WITH consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
percentage_increase AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013) AS pct_increase
    FROM consumption_by_segment
)
SELECT 'Max Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_increase
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM percentage_increase)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Min Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_increase
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM percentage_increase);

SELECT 
    ((last_driver_time - champion_time) * 100.0 / last_driver_time) AS faster_percentage
FROM (
    SELECT 
        -- Champion's time in milliseconds
        (SELECT r1.milliseconds
         FROM results r1
         JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId
         WHERE ra1.year = 2008 
           AND ra1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
           AND r1.position = 1
           AND r1.time IS NOT NULL
        ) AS champion_time,
        
        -- Last finisher's time in milliseconds
        (SELECT r2.milliseconds
         FROM results r2
         JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
         WHERE ra2.year = 2008 
           AND ra2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
           AND r2.time IS NOT NULL
         ORDER BY r2.position DESC
         LIMIT 1
        ) AS last_driver_time
) sub;

JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY female_account_holders DESC
LIMIT 9;
116:
WITH first_client AS (
    SELECT l.account_id
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY l.loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_1998,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_1993
    FROM trans t
    JOIN first_client fc ON t.account_id = fc.account_id
)
SELECT 
    ((balance_1998 - balance_1993) * 1.0 / balance_1993) * 100 AS increase_rate_percent
FROM balances;
129:
SELECT d.A2 AS district_name,
       t.amount,
       t.date
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ'
  AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%'
ORDER BY t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;
136:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS approved_loans_count
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE loan.date BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
  AND loan.amount >= 250000
  AND account.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE'
  AND loan.status = 'A';
137:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) AS running_contract_accounts
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status IN ('C', 'D')
  AND d.A2 = 'Branch location 1';
138:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS male_client_count
FROM client
WHERE gender = 'M'
  AND district_id = (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
  );
94:
SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district) AS salary_gap
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (
      SELECT MIN(birth_date)
      FROM client
      WHERE gender = 'F'
  )
  AND dist.A11 = (
      SELECT MIN(d2.A11)
      FROM client c2
      JOIN district d2 ON c2.district_id = d2.district_id
      WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
        AND c2.birth_date = (
            SELECT MIN(birth_date)
            FROM client
            WHERE gender = 'F'
        )
  );
145:
SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
  AND t.date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
  AND t.amount < (
      SELECT AVG(t2.amount)
      FROM trans t2
      WHERE t2.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
        AND t2.date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
  );
149:
SELECT DISTINCT d.type AS account_type
FROM disp d
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
WHERE di.A11 > 8000
  AND di.A11 <= 9000
  AND d.type <> 'OWNER';
152:
SELECT AVG(crimes) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.district_id, d.A15 AS crimes
    FROM district d
    JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
    WHERE d.A15 > 4000
      AND a.date >= '1997-01-01'
) AS qualifying_regions;
186:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN c.client_id END) * 100.0 / 
     COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE';
169:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1997' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) -
      SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)
    ) * 100.0 / 
      SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)
    ) AS growth_rate
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M';
173:
-- Part 1: Count how often account number 3 requested a statement
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS statement_request_count
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3
  AND k_symbol = 'Statement';

-- Part 2: Find the aim (k_symbol) of debiting a total of 3539 for account 3
SELECT 
    k_symbol,
    SUM(amount) AS total_debit
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3
  AND type = 'debit'
GROUP BY k_symbol
HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539;
159:
SELECT 
    t.trans_id,
    t.date,
    t.amount,
    t.balance,
    t.operation
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE c.client_id = 3356
  AND t.operation = 'VYBER';
168:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN c.client_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)) AS female_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
WHERE di.A11 > 10000;
189:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dist ON a.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, dist.A11 ASC;
192:
SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_running_contract_amount
FROM loan l
WHERE l.status IN ('C', 'D')
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = l.account_id
      AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
  );
120:
SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    a.account_id,
    a.frequency
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
  AND dist.A2 = 'east Bohemia'
  AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31';
119:
SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    a.date >= '1993-01-01'
    AND a.date < '1994-01-01'
    AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';
194:
SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM card ca
JOIN disp d ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';
89:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS account_count
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE account.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
  AND district.A3 = 'East Bohemia';
